course.title: Web Development
course.description: Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript from scratch. Build responsive websites and modern web applications.

course.title: Python Programming
course.description: Master Python for real-world applications including automation, scripting, and data processing.

course.title: Data Science
course.description: Dive into data analysis, visualization, and machine learning using Python, Pandas, and Scikit-learn.

course.title: Java Programming
course.description: Learn Java fundamentals, object-oriented programming, and build enterprise-level applications.

course.title: Cyber Security
course.description: Master ethical hacking, network security, and vulnerability assessment to protect digital assets.

course.title: Machine Learning
course.description: Learn supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, and deploy ML models in production.
